evaluators.name: Sunday Visit Plan with Children’s Program Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user created a visit plan using a Sunday 9–11am active service with a concurrent children’s program covering ages 5–10, and chose the earliest such service.

evaluators.name: Earliest Free Weekday Evening Class Registration Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user registered Alex Taylor for 2 attendees for the earliest free weekday class/workshop this month starting after 5:00pm.

evaluators.name: Room Reservation Next Wednesday 7–9pm Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user requested a 7–9pm room reservation next Wednesday for ~10 people, choosing the smallest-capacity room that can accommodate 8–12 attendees.

evaluators.name: Three Most Recent Forgiveness Sermons Watch-Later Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user added the three most recent sermons on forgiveness from the last six months to their watch-later playlist.

evaluators.name: Saturday Short-Hours Volunteer Interest Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user submitted a volunteer interest form for a Saturday role requiring under 3 hours per week using the provided contact info.

evaluators.name: Youth Ministry $25 One-Time Pledge Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user submitted a one-time pledge-only gift of $25 to the Youth Ministry fund using the provided donor details.

evaluators.name: Non-Overlapping Community Events in One Week Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user saved two community events in the same Monday–Sunday week where the first starts in the afternoon and the second begins at least one hour after the first ends, with no overlap.

evaluators.name: Marriage Counseling Next-Week Morning Appointment Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user requested a counseling appointment next week between 9am and 12pm with an active counseling pastor specializing in marriage, choosing the earliest available slot, using the provided contact details.
